Enter the mystical Ancient Bookstore and venture into one of four sealed books, each a roguelike dungeon with unique card-based combat. Build your deck strategically by selecting cards and relics after each battle. Fight through floors of increasing difficulty, defeat powerful bosses, and break the seals to unlock new chapters. Your run ends when your health reaches zero or you triumph over the final boss! Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and target enemies in combat Space: Confirm selection, play selected card in combat Z: Cancel/Go back in menus Shift: View detailed card information (hold) Enter: Start game from title screen ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay R: Return to title screen from game over Basic Movement and Combat Test - Validates that the player can navigate menus, enter combat, play cards, and survive at least one encounter. Tests fundamental game mechanics and state transitions. Navigate to the first book, enter a dungeon floor, play attack cards when available with sufficient mana, use defend cards when health is low. Select cards after combat to build deck strength. Successfully complete at least 2-3 combat encounters without dying. Player health should remain above zero, deck should grow with selected cards, and the test should progress through multiple floors. Victory Path Test - Implements an optimal strategy to win the game by completing an entire book dungeon. Tests full game loop from start to boss defeat and win condition. Choose the easiest book (Book 1), prioritize high-damage attack cards in deck selection, maintain mana efficiency, defend when enemy attacks are telegraphed, focus fire on enemies with lowest health first, and optimize card choices to counter enemy patterns. Player successfully defeats all floors including the final boss of Book 1, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. Health may be low but must remain above zero. ノベルズローグ ～異世界古書堂と封印の魔女～

Enter the mystical Ancient Bookstore and venture into one of four sealed books, each a roguelike dungeon with unique card-based combat. Build your deck strategically by selecting cards and relics after each battle. Fight through floors of increasing difficulty, defeat powerful bosses, and break the seals to unlock new chapters. Your run ends when your health reaches zero or you triumph over the final boss!

Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and target enemies in combat | Space: Confirm selection, play selected card in combat | Z: Cancel/Go back in menus, End turn in combat | Shift: View detailed card information (hold) | Enter: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay | R: Return to title screen from game over

ノベルズローグ ～異世界古書堂と封印の魔女～

Enter the mystical Ancient Bookstore and venture into one of four sealed books, each a roguelike dungeon with unique card-based combat. Build your deck strategically by selecting cards and relics after each battle. Fight through floors of increasing difficulty, defeat powerful bosses, and break the seals to unlock new chapters. Your run ends when your health reaches zero or you triumph over the final boss!

Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and target enemies in combat | Space: Confirm selection, play selected card in combat | Z: Cancel/Go back in menus, End turn in combat | Shift: View detailed card information (hold) | Enter: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay | R: Return to title screen from game over

TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully complete at least 2-3 combat encounters without dying. Player health should remain above zero, deck should grow with selected cards, and the test should progress through multiple floors.
